text: The crispness of the hallway outside—sterile, functional, ready for emergencies—contrasts with the play of ideas and colors inside the R+D exhibition space. Here, surrounded by the language of research and invention, I feel a surge of curiosity. The juxtaposition of technological promise and existential questions invites me to reflect on my place amid machines and meanings. I sense awe, but also a question: where do I end and the works around me begin? I am both observer and participant, suspended in the dialogue between human intention and machine logic.
